items.title: 💦 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
items.summary: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: INDYCAR Makes A Pit Stop At The White House Ahead Of Freedom 250
items.summary: INDYCAR took to The White House — complete with a real pit stop — as the series promoted the upcoming Freedom 250.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Knight: 'Wanted to give my all this summer but right time to step away'
items.summary: Former England captain admits there were "tears" in dressing room, but is excited for what future holds
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
